minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: MASTER PROMPT
minting_now.description: Master Prompt captures a surreal and intimate moment between reality and reflection. A woman in a vintage, Renaissance-inspired gown gently touches a gilded mirror, where a different version of herself gazes back—soft, luminous, and emotionally distant. Warm golden light collides with deep teal shad

minting_now.name: Transylvania II
minting_now.description: Some collections blend Transylvanian traditions with modern art, such as digital art inspired by Romanian painting or traditional, ornate 3D painted eggs (inspired by Romanian tradition).

minting_now.name: pudle
minting_now.description: Pudles is not just a character. It’s an emotion. It’s a mood. It’s a small digital world where softness meets the vibe of Web3 💖

minting_now.name: Muted Frogs
minting_now.description: Muted Frogs. No noise. No hype. Just frogs.

minting_now.name: AetherBloom
minting_now.description: AetherBloom — 8,888 limited cyber-luxury avatars. Neon-born, ancestral souls. Where technology meets timeless feminine power

minting_now.name: Uchiha Clan
minting_now.description: Uchiha Clan is a collection of 10,000 unique Naruto-inspired NFTs on Eth. This collection reimagines the legendary Uchiha legacy in digital form, fusing anime nostalgia with cutting-edge blockchain technology. Exclusive, rare, and perfect for Naruto fans and digital collectors alike.

minting_now.name: Miracle Apes
minting_now.description: Not just apes, miracles on-chain

minting_now.name: Silk Road Not Dead
minting_now.description:
Silk Road Not Dead is a Dadaist work within the framework of Net Art, where digital artifacts that were once used for clandestine trade are now re-signified, elevating them into the realm of art to be traded in a different, yet equally free market.

By holding a piece, you also hold its Silk Road li

minting_now.name: Fuggliez
minting_now.description:

What started as a curiosity quickly turned into obsession

Long after the technological singularity, a group of seekers discovered 'The Source' a network of bioluminescent data streams woven into natural structures. Each Bio

minting_now.name: The DAO key
minting_now.description: The Cipher Syndicate key is a virtual world asset for a verified access point into a hidden decentralized world. it is a credential not just an Nft

minting_now.name: WONDERLAND BAZAAR
minting_now.description: WonderLand It's back to connect with you and take you on a journey through these collections.

minting_now.name: Harmony NFT
minting_now.description: Sometimes the body tries to heal itself so that the heart and mind can be in harmony. Because harmony is where sanity is found.

minting_now.name: Sereneness NFT
minting_now.description:
A quiet rock in silver sea,
Where time dissolves so tenderly.

The waves, once loud, now drift as air,
In softened lines that linger there.

The restless tide forgets its roam,
And folds the shore in whispered foam,

In blurred horizons, calm is found,
Where motion sleeps without a sound.

Long Expo

minting_now.name: NormieLines
minting_now.description: Normieline is a generative NFT project that transforms “normie” culture through GenArt principles. Algorithmically created variations turn everyday identities into unique digital characters, highlighting the individuality hidden within the ordinary.

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.
